description: Authoritative dormant reference for PERLA1 RTP characters, portraits, NPCs, animals, events, and dialogue asset naming. Runtime behavior is unchanged until code explicitly loads this manifest.

legacyAssetException.note: Existing raycaster environment/object assets remain governed by ASSET_MANIFEST and are outside this RTP character/dialogue contract.

paths.derivedLeftAnimation: not_stored; derive iso_idle_left from iso_idle_right and iso_walk_left from iso_walk_right by horizontal mirror
